arts.ttl: Report: Latest update has emerged on Mohamed Salah’s contract talks at Liverpool
arts.sum: Apart from recognition for their brilliant form this season, most of the talk surrounding Liverpool this season is about the contract situation of their players. The Reds are currently involved in contract talks with three of their most important players; Mohamed Salah, Virgil Van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold. They have all entered the final year […] The post Report: Latest update has emerged on Mohamed Salah’s contract talks at Liverpool appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'one of nine clubs' tracking 21-goal winger who could replace Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are one of nine teams who are running the rule over LA Galaxy winger Gabriel Pec, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Man City plot stunning Liverpool raid for free agent superstar
arts.sum: Manchester City have 'already opened talks' with Trent Alexander-Arnold, according to a sensational report. According to an eyebrow-raising report from CaughtOffside, Liverpool's bitter Premier League rivals Man City are also in the mix.

arts.ttl: Everton fan’s Merseyside derby dream dashed after flying in from Australia
arts.sum: Storm Darragh forces Liverpool game to be called off Fifteen-year-old gets invite to Everton training ground A 15-year-old from Australia used all his savings to attend the final league derby at Goodison Park, only for the match to be postponed four hours before kick-off. The Everton fan from Sydney, Mackenzie Kinsella, asked his Liverpool-born mum at Easter whether he could return to England for the historic occasion. Continue reading...
